data.title: Lunit, CellCarta Announce Strategic Collaboration to Accelerate AI-Enabled Digital Pathology for Companion Diagnostic Programs
data.description: A collaboration has been established between Lunit and CellCarta. Lunit's AI pathology algorithms compatible with various platforms will be integrated with CellCarta's global CDx development and laboratory services. This partnership aims to assist biopharma companies in reducing risks associated with assets and speeding up evidence collection and CDx launch processes. The collaboration was announced on March 30, 2026, in Seoul, South Korea, and Montreal.

data.title: Wondershare Earns Dual Honors at the 2026 Cybersecurity Excellence Awards
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on March 30, 2026, Wondershare, a prominent company in creativity and productivity solutions, was honored for its innovative work in data security and recovery at the 2026 Cybersecurity Excellence Awards. Wondershare’s product, Dr.Fone, was awarded the Gold Award for Data Security.

data.title: Merz Aesthetics® Announces EU Approval of Two New Indications for Their Hyaluronic Acid Filler BELOTERO® Balance
data.description: In Frankfurt, Germany, Merz Aesthetics®, a prominent player in medical aesthetics, has announced that BELOTERO® Balance has gained EU approval for treating infraorbital hollow (such as tear trough) and horizontal forehead lines1. This hyaluronic acid dermal filler now offers expanded usage, adding versatility to its portfolio of approved facial indications1. As the largest dedicated medical aesthetics business globally, Merz Aesthetics® continues to innovate with this development that widens the scope of BELOTERO® Balance's applications.

data.title: Palantir Technologies Announces the Renewal and Expansion of Its Partnership With Stellantis for an Additional Five Years
data.description: In Paris, Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR) revealed a renewed and expanded partnership with Stellantis, marked by a new five-year agreement building on their collaboration since 2016. This partnership focuses on aiding Stellantis in effectively utilizing data and artificial intelligence. Stellantis will increase its utilization of Palantir Foundry and commence deploying the Palantir Artificial Intelligence Platform.

data.title: FPT Wins AI & Machine Learning Innovation Award at 2026 InsurInnovator Connect Asia Awards
data.description: In Hanoi, Vietnam, FPT, a leading global IT services provider, was recently recognized for excellence in innovation within the field of AI and Machine Learning. The company received the AI & Machine Learning Innovation Award at the prestigious 2026 InsurInnovator Connect (IIC) Asia Awards for its cutting-edge platform, iSuite. This award is a testament to FPT's commitment to driving innovation and shaping the future of insurance in Asia. The recognition celebrates initiatives that have a measurable impact and set new industry standards. iSuite, FPT's AI-native digital insurance platform, has played a pivotal role in transforming the landscape of the insurance sector.

data.title: ANTHBOT Celebrates Anniversary with Spring Savings
data.description: To celebrate its anniversary and kick off the spring mowing season, ANTHBOT, a leading robotic lawn mower company, is rolling out special promotions in Europe. Customers can enjoy discounts of up to €270 on the M and N Series models. This limited-time offer will be available from March 30 to April 19. Take advantage of this promotion to equip your lawn with cutting-edge robotic technology at a reduced price.

data.title: Michael Saylor Says It's Time To Put His Laser Eyes Back On, Fellow Bitcoin Bull Chimes In: 'Never Took Them Off'
data.description: CEO Michael Saylor of Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR) reaffirmed his strong support for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) by sharing the popular "laser eyes" meme on Saturday. The meme, a signal of bullish conviction within the Bitcoin community, involves a person with glowing red eyes in their profile picture to symbolize intense focus on Bitcoin's price. Saylor reposted the meme, stating, "It's time to put the laser eyes back on." This move is seen as another push from Saylor to encourage HODLers to remain steadfast despite ongoing market pressures. Samson Mow, a fellow Bitcoin advocate, also...

data.title: Bitdeer Engages DCI to Finalise Development of Norway’s Largest AI Data Center
data.description: Targeted for completion by December 2026, the Tydal Data Center (TDC) with a capacity of 180 MW is set to serve as a hub for co-location services catering primarily to Nvidia's advanced Vera Rubin AI technology.

data.title: KFC turns its restaurant totems into giant kebabs to launch its new döner
data.description: PS21 has created a campaign featuring the brand's iconic imagery as a rotisserie to promote the debut of its new fried chicken kebab menu. The campaign will be live from March 24 to March 30 in several KFC locations in Spain. Additionally, there will be an audiovisual component crafted by Oriental.

data.title: Airoha Technology Achieves Global Milestone as First Silicon Provider to Successfully Commercialize prplOS-based Fiber Broadband Platforms
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in Zhubei City, Airoha Technology, a subsidiary of MediaTek, revealed its pioneering role in adapting to the growing popularity of open-source systems among network operators worldwide. The company shared that after working closely with Tier-1 operators for three years, they have emerged as the leading provider in this space.

data.title: AKC Canine Health Foundation Joins All Access hosted by Andy Garcia to Explore the Science of Veterinary Innovation
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in Los Angeles, the AKC Canine Health Foundation (CHF) revealed a partnership with the educational show "All Access hosted by Andy Garcia" to produce a documentary segment focusing on canine health research. The filming of the segment is scheduled for April 15, 2026.
